/usr/bin/cc -g -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -ffile-prefix-map=/tmp/workspace/gdha/pacman.c=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -fcf-protection -fdebug-prefix-map=/tmp/workspace/gdha/pacman.c=/usr/src/pacman-c-1.0.0-1 -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wl,-Bsymbolic-functions -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/pacman.c.o -o pacman  libsokol.a -lX11 -lXi -lXcursor -lGL -lasound -ldl -lm
